text: bro did you see the Syracuse city council thing about the transit overhaul? Priya was losing it at breakfast. this directly affects like every student who doesn't have a car lol
wait which one, the bus route cuts or the fare hike proposal??
both apparently. Amara's already drafting a student gov response, she texted me before my 8am. girl does not sleep
ok that's actually wild. the timing too — summer session students have even fewer options
right?? I'm tutoring til 6 today and my shift runs past the last express. wrote three pages on municipal transit equity last semester and now I'm living it 💀
your dad would say 'told you local politics matters more than national'
Chidi Patterson has been right about exactly one thing and somehow it applies to every situation. I'm filling my water bottle and going to class, updates later
lmaooo go. text me after your shift, we'll figure out the bus situation together
